building_row.notes: Lumina is stronger than it first looked on paper. Public sources now clearly support 24-hour concierge, controlled access, EV charging, garage parking, stacked in-unit laundry, dishwasher, AC, yoga space, media room, and pet-friendly terms with no pet deposit or weight limit. The main tradeoff is location and future certainty, not missing essentials. Apartments.com rates the area as Busy with a 66 SoundScore, and Urbanize reported in July 2025 that Morguard planned to add 36 apartments by converting office and parking area at the tower.
